subject: Urgent Request: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Shopgrid
ROLE: Mid Software Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: TBD
RATE: 800 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java and PostgreSQL.

Key requirements:

  • Java
  • PostgreSQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Axel Björk
IT Sourcing Specialist
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 70 455 67 89
